---
title: "GO and KEGG Enrichment Lollipop Plot"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load-packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
```

```{r}
df <- read_excel(
"Figure6G_GO_DAVID_style_source.xlsx",
sheet = 1
)

# EXACT ORDER
term_order <- c(
"In utero embryonic development",
"Cell Proliferation",
"Gland development",
"Insulin Receptor Binding",
"Cytokine Binding",
"Gland Morphogenesis",
"Cell Surface Receptor Signaling",
"Positive Regulation of Cell Migration",
"Organ Morphogenesis",
"Cell Periphery",
"Cellular Senescence",
"Growth Factor Binding",
"Signaling by PDGF",
"Diseases of signal transduction by growth factor receptors",
"Fibroblast differentiation",
"TGFβ ligand-receptor complex",
"Receptor complex",
"Signaling by Receptor Tyrosine Kinases",
"MAPK Signaling",
"Signal Transduction",
"EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor resistance"
)

df$Term <- factor(
df$Term,
levels = rev(term_order)
)

# CATEGORY
df$Group <- ifelse(
grepl("KEGG", df$Category),
"KEGG",
"BP"
)

# NUMERIC
df$Count <- as.numeric(df$Count)

# PLOT
ggplot(df,
aes(
x = -log10(PValue),
y = Term
)) +

geom_segment(
aes(
x = 0,
xend = -log10(PValue),
y = Term,
yend = Term,
color = Group
),
linewidth = 3
) +

geom_point(
aes(
x = -log10(PValue),
size = Count,
fill = Group
),
shape = 21,
color = "black",
stroke = 0.5
) +

scale_color_manual(
values = c(
"BP" = "tomato",
"KEGG" = "royalblue"
)
) +

scale_fill_manual(
values = c(
"BP" = "tomato",
"KEGG" = "royalblue"
)
) +

scale_size(range = c(2,6)) +

labs(
x = "-log10(PValue)",
y = NULL
) +

theme_classic(base_size = 11) +

theme(
legend.position = "right",
axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
)
